title: tephrosia noctiflora
intro: Tephrosia noctiflora, also known as the moonlight tephrosia or night-flowering tephrosia, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family and is native to tropical Africa. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Tephrosia noctiflora include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Tephrosia noctiflora can be prepared as a herbal remedy in various forms, including tea, infusion, and topical creams, which are made by extracting the plant's leaves and roots.
